canonical_terms.Sentai: the full learning-and-play collective around a campaign
canonical_terms.party: the Bookworms crossing into a specific dimension in a specific session
canonical_terms.guides: returning Bookworms and educators who support the party without taking its choices away
canonical_terms.Rainbowsol: the threshold figure who conducts the burrow ritual and guides the party through the portal

retired_vocabulary: earlier split team labels removed from the archive
